operations.title: Dead by Daylight’s Black Banquet Has Begun: Everything To Know
operations.contents: Black Banquet is now live with the two-phase 10th anniversary event structure, event-exclusive interactions, and a clear call to re-engage the existing player base.

operations.title: Shane Wiigwaas Is Dead By Daylight’s Latest Survivor
operations.contents: Behaviour introduced Shane Wiigwaas as the latest survivor and highlighted his chase, healing, and pressure-swing perks as part of the Life Road release beat.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight 10th Anniversary Recap: Announcements & Celebrations
operations.contents: The 10th anniversary recap rolls up the key reveals, celebration moments, and forward roadmap messaging Behaviour used to frame Year 10.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight’s Anniversary Party Is Almost Here
operations.contents: Behaviour used the anniversary party post to amplify offline celebration activities and warm the audience up for the Year 10 live broadcast.

operations.title: Jason Has Finally Come To Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The Jason reveal confirms DBD’s biggest anniversary chapter beat and remains the clearest acquisition and awareness driver for the current cycle.

operations.title: The Entity Unveiled: A Guide To Dead by Daylight’s Eldritch Horror
operations.contents: The lore explainer reinforces DBD’s horror identity and gives Behaviour a lower-cost narrative beat between feature-heavy release posts.

patches.title: 10.0.2 | Bugfix Patch
patches.note_zh: 10.0.2 重新启用周年活动队列中的 Doctor，下调 The Slasher 的 Deputy’s Badge 触发范围，并集中修复 Black Banquet、音频、角色与地图问题。
patches.note_en: 10.0.2 re-enables The Doctor in the anniversary queue, nerfs The Slasher’s Deputy’s Badge trigger range, and fixes a broad set of Black Banquet, audio, character, and map issues.
patches.contents: 10.0.2 re-enables The Doctor in the anniversary queue, narrows Deputy’s Badge to 2m, and fixes a wide set of Black Banquet, audio, character, perk, and map issues.

patches.note_zh: 10.0.1 为 6 月 25 日上线的 Black Banquet 活动预热，同时实装 Shane Wiigwaas、调整 Cross-Examination，并修复大量音频、角色、地图、Perk 与 UI 问题。
patches.note_en: 10.0.1 prepares the June 25 Black Banquet event, ships Shane Wiigwaas, tunes Cross-Examination, and delivers a broad bug-fix pass across audio, characters, maps, perks, and UI.
patches.contents: 10.0.1 adds Shane Wiigwaas, sets up the Black Banquet anniversary event, and fixes audio, characters, maps, perks, UI, and event-related issues.

patches.title: 10.0.0 | Jason Patch Notes
patches.note_zh: 10.0.0 正式服上线 Jason 章节与 The Slasher，同步加入 Aura 自定义、Killer Power Match Details 页，并修复大量角色、音频与地图问题。
patches.note_en: 10.0.0 brings the live Jason chapter and The Slasher, plus aura customization, a Killer Power Match Details tab, and a large bug-fix pass across characters, audio, and maps.
patches.contents: 10.0.0 launches the Jason chapter with The Slasher, Omnipresent Evil, aura customization, new killer details UI, and a large stability and balance pass.

patches.title: 10.0.0 | Jason PTB Patch Notes
patches.note_zh: 10.0.0 PTB 开放 Jason 章节测试，带来 The Slasher、Omnipresent Evil / Throwing Spikes 能力，以及新一轮 Perk 与 UI 变更。
patches.note_en: 10.0.0 PTB opens the Jason chapter test with The Slasher, Omnipresent Evil / Throwing Spikes, and a fresh round of perk and UI changes.
patches.contents: The 10.0.0 PTB opens Jason testing, introduces The Slasher and Omnipresent Evil, and starts the latest perk and UI iteration cycle.

patches.title: 9.6.2 | Bugfix Patch
patches.note_zh: 9.6.2 以稳定性与错误修复为主，覆盖 2v8、音频、角色、地图、Perk、平台兼容和闪烁灯光问题。
patches.note_en: 9.6.2 is a stability-focused hotfix covering 2v8, audio, characters, maps, perks, platform compatibility, and flashing-light fixes.
patches.contents: 9.6.2 focuses on stability, covering 2v8, audio, characters, maps, perks, platform compatibility, and flashing-light fixes.

patches.title: 9.6.1 | Bugfix Patch
patches.note_zh: 9.6.1 继续修正 Diminishing Returns 文档、进度条表现，并对 Doctor 与 Ghost Face 做数值调优。
patches.note_en: 9.6.1 continues cleanup around Diminishing Returns documentation, progress bar presentation, and numeric tuning for Doctor and Ghost Face.
patches.contents: 9.6.1 continues cleanup around Diminishing Returns documentation, progress bar presentation, and numeric tuning for Doctor and Ghost Face.

store.name: 黎明杀机
store.short_description: 10年恐惧相伴。10年的惊吓与刺激体验。10年的残暴献祭与惊险逃脱。 永久困于邪恶的幻境之中，即使死亡也无法逃脱，这是一场需要勇气和智慧的较量，四名意志坚定的逃生者在残忍对局中面对嗜血杀手。选择一方，进入多人非对称竞技游戏世界，获得最佳恐怖游戏体验。
store.short_description_en: 10 years of horror. 10 years of jump scares and close calls. 10 years of brutal sacrifices and thrilling escapes. Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits.
